title: 2. Lighting and Exposure
text:
Exposure  affects  the  result.  Just  little  bit  of  more
exposure can make a patient’s face a lot younger with
less wrinkles. If you use the exactly same room without
any other light source, one-time setting can be enough.
However, there can be some amount of natural light
which changes the exposure. So, a 50% gray card is
useful, if you include a 50% gray card inside the frame,
you can adjust to the same condition even later.
